subtitle: Feeding, health & vet care for your cat

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's feeding count with progress ring toward daily goal, time since last feeding with urgency coloring, latest weight with mini sparkline trend, days since last vet visit with reminder badge, and current care streak

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Context-adaptive entry form: selecting event type reveals only relevant fields (feeding → food type + portion, vet → reason + cost, weight → slider, medication → name + notes, symptom → type + mood). Quick-tap presets for common meals at top.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Vertical timeline of all care events with color-coded type icons, filterable by event type via chip bar. Grouped by date with daily feeding summary counts. Swipe to delete.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: feeding frequency bar chart (7-day), weight trend line chart (all-time), food type distribution donut, symptom frequency radar, mood distribution over time, vet cost breakdown by year, and generated health insights with actionable recommendations

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayFeedingCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of feeding events logged today, drives the progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastFeedingTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Timestamp of the most recent feeding entry across all days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timeSinceLastFeeding
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Human-readable elapsed time since last feeding (e.g. '2h 30m ago'), turns red if > 8 hours

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one feeding logged, resets if a day is missed

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDailyFeedings
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean feedings per day over the past 7 days, compared to previous 7 days for trend arrow

viewModelComputedProperties.name: latestWeight
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most recent weight check value in lbs

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weightTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between latest weight and the one before it; positive = gained, negative = lost

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weightHistory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All weight check entries as date-value pairs for line chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: daysSinceLastVetVisit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Calendar days since last vet visit; nil if no visits logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalVetCostsThisYear
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of cost field for all vet visit entries in the current calendar year

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyFeedingData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 7 structs with date and feeding count for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedTypeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of each food type over past 30 days for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: symptomFrequency
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Occurrence count per symptom type over past 30 days, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Distribution of logged moods over past 30 days for horizontal bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingConsistencyScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 0–100 score: compute std deviation of feeding times over 7 days, map to score (low variance = high score)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayFeedingCount / dailyGoal clamped to 0.0–1.0 for progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: healthInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of plain-text insights generated from pattern analysis: feeding gaps, weight alerts, vet reminders, symptom clusters, mood shifts

dailyGoal.description: Target number of feedings per day (typical adult cat: 2-3 meals)

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one feeding event was logged. Streak resets at midnight if the previous calendar day had zero feeding entries.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Weekly feeding average compared to prior week (↑↓→). Weight trend: linear regression over last 5 weight checks to determine gaining/losing/stable (threshold: ±0.2 lbs). Symptom trend: compare 7-day symptom count to previous 7 days. Feeding consistency: standard deviation of feeding hour-of-day over 7 days, lower = more consistent.
insights: Feeding gap alert: flag when time since last feeding exceeds 10 hours during daytime (6am-10pm)
Weight change alert: notify if weight changes more than 0.5 lbs between consecutive checks, or if 3+ consecutive checks show same direction trend
Vet reminder: suggest routine checkup if daysSinceLastVetVisit exceeds 180 days; urgent if > 365
Symptom cluster warning: alert if 3+ symptom entries logged within any 7-day window, recommend vet visit
Mood shift detection: flag if rolling 7-day dominant mood shifts from positive (playful/calm/affectionate) to negative (lethargic/anxious/aggressive)
Feeding consistency praise: congratulate if feedingConsistencyScore > 80 for 7+ consecutive days
Annual vet cost summary: monthly and yearly spending with per-visit average and year-over-year comparison
